div1.entryFree:
Cape, 1) headland: will trench him here and on this north side win this c. of land, H4A III, 1, 113. what from the c. can you discern at sea? Oth. II, 1, 1.
2) the part of a garment hanging from the neck behind: with a small compassed c. Shr. IV, 3, 140.*lace for your c. Wint. IV, 4, 323.
